adpClientId.title: ADP Client ID
adpClientId.description: OAuth client_id registered with the Luminary Life ADP Marketplace app.

adpClientSecret.title: ADP Client Secret
adpClientSecret.description: OAuth client_secret paired with the client_id.

adpCertPem.title: ADP Client Certificate (PEM)
adpCertPem.description: Full contents of adp.cert.pem. Begins with -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----.

adpKeyPem.title: ADP Client Private Key (PEM)
adpKeyPem.description: Full contents of adp.key.pem. Begins with -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY----- (or RSA PRIVATE KEY).

startDate.title: Start date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
startDate.description: Inclusive start date for the punch window. Defaults to today (CST).

endDate.title: End date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
endDate.description: Inclusive end date for the punch window. Defaults to startDate.

associateOids.title: Filter to these associateOIDs
associateOids.description: Optional whitelist; when provided, only punches for these workers are emitted (typically the linked ROLI agents).

punchesEndpoint.title: Punches endpoint path
punchesEndpoint.description: Override if ADP changes the URL or you want to test /time/v1/punches as a fallback.

tokenUrl.title: ADP Token URL
tokenUrl.description: OAuth token endpoint. Override only if ADP changes the URL.

apiBase.title: ADP API Base URL
apiBase.description: Base URL for ADP REST endpoints.
